headline: IQVIA (IQV) Just Drew A New Artisan Partners Bet On AI And Resilience
summary: Artisan Partners has initiated a new position in IQVIA Holdings (NYSE:IQV), highlighting its view on the company's resilience and AI upside. The investor has publicly argued that IQVIA's exposure to AI could support the business, even as parts of the clinical research industry face concern about disruption and demand softness. IQVIA Holdings, trading at $203.79, sits at an interesting point for investors, with the stock up 10.9% over the past 30 days and 25.8% over the past year. Longer...
